CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2020 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-25-2020 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-25-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Set For Trial On Jun-29-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-15-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Vincent J. Adams, Esq. of Fisher Phillips, T:415.490.9036, for defendant/moving party;
Christopher R. LeClerc, Esq. of LeClerc & LeClerc, LLP, T:415.445.0900, for plaintiff/opposing party.

RULING: Plaintiff's counsel contested the Court's tentative ruling. At the conclusion of arguments, the Court reversed its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT LIGHT LABS INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration:

Defendant Light Labs Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is denied.

Defendant's counsel requests the Court to issue a Statement of Decision.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare a proposed order that repeats the substantive portion of Court's ruling as stated at the hearing and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.comAppearances:

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Oct-04-2019 Continued To Oct-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher LeClerc, Esq. 415-445-0900 of Le Clerc & Le Clerc LLP for Plaintiff.
Vincent Adams, Esq. 415-490-9000 of Fisher Phillips for Defendant LIGHT LABS INC.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court grants Plaintiff's CCP 170.6 challenge. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT LIGHT LABS INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay The Proceedings Pending The Outcome Of Arbitration.

Continued to 10/15/19 at 9:30 am before the Hon. Ethan P. Schulman.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
